The '''Battle of Kalla VII''' took place early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], as part of [[Operation Skyhook]].

==Prologue==
With the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attempting to find the location of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] discovered that [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ships were using the base near [[Kalla VII]] for supplies and repairs on their way to the Death Star. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] proposed to destroy the Imperial base to strand any passing ships heading for the battlestation, leaving them open to capture.

==The battle==
The plan involved three stages; destroying the base itself, conducting a raid to remove the escorts of the target ship and leave it defenseless and disabling and capturing the ship itself.

===First stage===
A group of starfighters was assembled for the first stage of the battle, with [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] leading three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] to destroy the base.

The mission was successful as the Rebels destroyed all supply [[Class-A cargo container|containers]], the defensive [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]] and two [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] from [[Diputs group|''Diputs'']] group. As the Rebels were preparing to leave, the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Priam (starship)|''Priam'']] came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], killing [[Breth Gart]] in a freak collision when his fighter hit the ship.

===Second stage===
With the ''Priam'' now stranded the Rebels prepared to move against it. In order to protect the stranded vessel, the Empire moved quickly to dispatch three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] from ''[[Dar Es]]'' group to protect it and also deployed a [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]] around the ship. A [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] was also dispatched to deliver supplies and personnel. The Rebels, meanwhile, prepared an assault to remove these defenses. Two [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] were to engage the ''Priam's'' [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] while two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from Red Squadron, again led by Farlander, were to destroy the corvettes with their [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].

All three corvettes were quickly destroyed, as was the incoming transport and the Rebels withdrew leaving only the minefield and a handful of TIEs to defend the ''Priam''. One R-22 was lost during the battle but a subsequent rescue operation retrieved the pilot who had been able to eject.

===Third stage===
With the escort destroyed, General Dodonna gave the order for [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] to conduct a "board and capture" operation against the ''Priam''. The Rebels sent a complete squadron of Y-Wings from [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] to disable the ''Priam'', attacking in two groups of six. Keyan Farlander, having just returned to the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] from the previous mission, immediately launched to support the operation, flying the only craft available, an R-22 Spearhead.

Farlander moved quickly to destroy the few remaining [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] before they could pose a threat to the Y-wings and then proceeded to destroy the minefield while the Y-wings used their [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] to disable the ''Priam''. The ''Priam'' made one last attempt to fight back, launching two [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] but they too were quickly destroyed.

After losing many Y-Wings, the ''Priam'' was finally disabled. The Y-wings withdrew while the Special Forces team moved in with transports from ''[[Assault]]'' group carrying commandos to board the frigate. Once captured, [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] from [[Panda (transports)|''Panda'']] group delivered the new crew for the ship while transport group ''[[Jordi]]'' delivered supplies. Once all the transports were aboard, the Rebel forces, along with the newly captured frigate, jumped to hyperspace.

==Aftermath==
Despite Farlander having not been scheduled to fly in the final part of the battle, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Lagrane]] acknowledged during his debriefing that his actions had helped keep Rebel losses lower than expected.

Examining the frigate's database, the Alliance learned that the Death Star was located above [[Despayre]]. Corvette group ''[[Ethar]]'' was dispatched to the [[Horuz system/Legends|Horuz system]] to investigate.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
